items.title: Three signature uniform moments await Colts fans in 2026

From a new take on AFC South competition to two fan-favorite alternate looks, the Colts' 2026 uniform schedule will feature three signature moments at Lucas Oil Stadium.

items.title: Colts to add HOF kicker Vinatieri to Ring of Honor
items.summary: INDIANAPOLIS – The Indianapolis Colts will induct Hall of Fame kicker Adam Vinatieri into the team’s Ring of Honor. The induction ceremony will happen during the Oct. 18 home game against the Tennessee Titans. Vinatieri played in 365 games over 24 seasons with the Colts (2006-2019) and New England Patriots (1996-2005). He finished with 2,673 [...]
